allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''',''''utf8''''\)\); const v5=d.filter\(v=>v.startsWith\(''''5.''''\)\); console.log\(''''5.x versions:'''', v5.slice\(-5\)\); const v6=d.filter\(v=>v.startsWith\(''''6.''''\)\); console.log\(''''Latest 6.x:'''', v6.slice\(-3\)\);")
